Multiple failures or warnings in test:
  1)   Expected: String containing "Selenium"
  But was:  "Engineer who works the whole stack — QA automation, full-stack development, CI/CD pipelines, anything that ships. Quality and code, end to end."

  2)   Expected: String containing "React"
  But was:  "Engineer who works the whole stack — QA automation, full-stack development, CI/CD pipelines, anything that ships. Quality and code, end to end."

  3)   Expected: String containing "C#"
  But was:  "Engineer who works the whole stack — QA automation, full-stack development, CI/CD pipelines, anything that ships. Quality and code, end to end."

Status badge resolved to unexpected value: IN_PROGRESS
  Expected: any of < "PASSING", "FAILURE", "OFFLINE", "PENDING" >
  But was:  "IN_PROGRESS"
